data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the counter lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed), but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data regarding the implementation or state of the counter lifecycle. The linked use case mentions the need for a counter lifecycle but lacks concrete evidence to confirm its coverage. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of counter lifecycle states (open, paused, closed) being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the counter lifecycle states.
